60秒任务: 「补充观点」：议程/打断/反对/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 会议组织｜打断｜反对｜补充｜总结｜决策确认
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Can I add one point?（补充观点）
I’d like to build on that.（承接补充）
That connects with what ___ said.（连接他人观点）
One thing we haven’t mentioned is ___.（补遗漏）
I agree, and I’d add ___.（同意并补充）
There’s another angle to consider.（提供角度）
Just to add some context, ___.（补背景）
That point also affects ___.（说明影响）
I think the missing piece is ___.（指出缺口）
Could we also look at ___?（扩展讨论）
This may not change the decision, but it matters.（说明重要性）
Let me add a practical example.（举例）
I see the same issue from the customer side.（换位视角）
That supports the earlier point.（支撑前文）
I’ll keep this brief.（控制时长）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: point, angle, context, example, customer, impact, decision, missing piece
Verbs: add, build on, mention, affect, consider, support, connect, explain
Adjectives / Status: practical, relevant, brief, related, overlooked, useful
Time / Place: earlier, from the customer side, in the data, on the slide
Chunks: build on that, another angle, missing piece, keep this brief, add context
